chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Welcome back to 100 days of code

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: When I was in 2nd year of college, I knew C++ very well

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I was doing coding, I knew coding, I knew HTML

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: But I was not able to work in any industry

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: May be I was not able to get any C++ project

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Now I am not saying that C++ is a bad programming language

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I have made many conditional related programs with the help of C++

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I have done many other things like making a calculator

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: But I was not able to work in any industry

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made PLAS applications and did a lot of freelancing

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I consider Python as a language which taught me the use of programming

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Why we give so much value to programming in industry and why programming is used so much in industry

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: In today's video, I am going to show you some programs which you will enjoy watching

chunks.text: Because after watching these programs, you will understand the actual use of programming

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Why programming is used

chunks.title: Some_Amazing

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: There is a Jarvis virtual assistant which works on your map

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: It shows you what you say and what commands you give

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: The biggest reason to make this course is that there are many new things in Python

chunks.title: Some_Amazing

chunks.title: Some_Amazing

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: The next program I want to show you is our love calculator

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: It is an amazing calculator that shows how much love there is between two people

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Obviously, it will not tell you accurately how much love there is between you and your partner

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: You all know it

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: But in a fun way, we made this program using a random module

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: If we put two names, it will tell us the love percentage

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: How much love there is between two people

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Let's try it out

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I will put Harry in the name and I will put Payal in the name of the partner

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: I calculate 97%

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Okay, great

chunks.title: Some_Amazing
chunks.text: Now, let's say I write here

chunks.title: Some_Amazing

chunks.title: Some_Amazing

text: Welcome back to 100 days of code Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life When I was in 2nd year of college, I knew C++ very well I was doing coding, I knew coding, I knew HTML But I was not able to work in any industry May be I was not able to get any C++ project Now I am not saying that C++ is a bad programming language I have made many conditional related programs with the help of C++ I have done many other things like making a calculator But I was not able to work in any industry When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made PLAS applications and did a lot of freelancing I consider Python as a language which taught me the use of programming Why we give so much value to programming in industry and why programming is used so much in industry In today's video, I am going to show you some programs which you will enjoy watching You will say that it is fun to watch these programs Because after watching these programs, you will understand the actual use of programming Why programming is used I will tell you 5 programs today and you will enjoy watching them Some of them are very amazing games There is a Jarvis virtual assistant which works on your map It shows you what you say and what commands you give The biggest reason to make this course is that there are many new things in Python There are many new approaches which I want to tell you This brand new course will touch all those things For example, Valorous operator has come in Python There are many other additions There are many easy ways to do things We will cover all these things in this course I will teach you Python so well that a snake can walk on its map You will be able to run Python on your map by programming You will be able to do whatever you want Let's go to the showcase and I will show you my programs Which I made with the help of Python The first program I want to show you is Jarvis virtual assistant This program takes your commands and after taking your commands It does some work and shows As you can see, it has opened YouTube It is a very cool program You give it a command and it finishes the task The next program I want to show you is our love calculator It is an amazing calculator that shows how much love there is between two people Obviously, it will not tell you accurately how much love there is between you and your partner You all know it But in a fun way, we made this program using a random module If we put two names, it will tell us the love percentage How much love there is between two people Let's try it out I will put Harry in the name and I will put Payal in the name of the partner I calculate 97% Okay, great Now, let's say I write here Let's say I write Sanskriti here So 0-3 comes here I wrote 3% It means I should stay away from girls named Sanskriti Boys named Harry So this is a very fun calculator I hope you will enjoy running it The next program I want to show you is the face recognition program Which uses the Harkascade algorithm Basically, it tells in an image where the face is Where is the face This is a face detection algorithm So here you see in the face of Robert Downey Jr. It will tell where the actual face is hidden The picture will tell where the face is hidden So I run it for 1.jpg file You can run it on your favorite file So I run it here After running, you see it has detected all the faces from this image So I can run it for different images It is not necessary that it will work for one image It is working for different images It was a very fun program It was fun to make it Our next project is the Flappy Bird game Which is probably someone Someone who has not played this game Basically, it is a very good game We play a lot on our phones But here you can play a game made by your hands on your computer Flappy Bird I can play it See, I am playing it here And it will be fun to play it So the fifth Last but not the least I have made many other projects But this is something I want to showcase How to make a snake game in Python I will play this game and show you As you can see This is our black snake This is our red snake I know it can be done better By changing the image But here I made logic And see I am playing it I will break the high score of 90 I can make a lot of scores I will tell you I am a very dangerous hardcore gamer You can see The score is 90 I don't want to get out I want to get out I made a score of 100 It's fun to play a game made by your hands I just want to tell you So in the coming videos We are going to do something like this I will tell you And it will be a lot of fun Because we will not only make these projects We will make many such projects In which we will be converting our ideas In reality Now all this code I am going to give you I want you to Run all these codes In your system Whether you are able to run it or not But run them All the modules I have imported You install them By installing pip If not now then when we go to the module
